payload.answer: I could not save durable article knowledge because the provided URL fetch failed with a 404 network error. I can only note that you wanted to remember the URL for memory architecture, but I will not invent or store article claims without accessible content.

entity_resolution.reason: The URL fetch failed with a 404 network error, so the article content and claims could not be verified.

details: No article content was available to inspect.
No durable memory card was committed because source claims could not be verified.

repair_options: Provide a cached copy or archive link.
Ask to save only a bookmark-style note that the URL was intended to be useful for memory architecture, acknowledging the content was unavailable.
